description.from: Restores HP of the 4 allies with the lowest HP by 10% of Max HP, and additionally restores 100*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 16.1% ATK HP every 1sec for 10sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to: Restores HP equal to 10% of Max HP to the 4 allies with the lowest HP, and additionally restores 88*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+40.5% ATK HP every 1sec for 10sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Removes all negative effects from all allies and increases their M.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 15sec.
description.to: Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Magic DEF by 50*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 15sec.

description.from: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second increases by 35%.
description.to: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second is increased by 35%.
